title: Mission
body:
Mission
Create the definitive career guide for Enterprise Digital Experience Engineers.

  • Evidence over assumptions
  • Long-term value
  • Publication quality
  • Continuous improvement

title: Career Strategy
summary: Long-term direction for AEM and DXP engineers.
body: Target product companies and GCCs that invest in Adobe Experience Cloud. Depth beats breadth: own the full delivery stack from authoring through edge performance.

title: Professional Branding
body: Position yourself as an Enterprise Digital Experience Engineer — not only an AEM developer. Use the templates below for LinkedIn, outreach, and resume bullets.

title: Core Skills
summary: Priority technologies for senior AEM engineers.
body: Master the intersection of content platform engineering (AEM Sites, Assets, Cloud Service), integration (Analytics, Target, AEP), and delivery (Dispatcher, CDN, Edge Delivery). The technology reference table lists prerequisites and official resources.

title: Learning Roadmap
summary: Structured paths above and in the roadmap panels.
body: Follow the three learning paths rendered at the top of this handbook: AEM foundation, Cloud & Edge, and Experience Platform integration. Each step links to technologies and curated resources.

title: How I Apply
summary: My apply workflow, outreach, learning rhythm, and tools.
body: Personal methods below — opinion and workflow, not generic templates. Reusable resume and outreach templates remain in Professional Branding.

title: Career Command Center
body:
• Master Company Database ✓
  • Recruiter CRM (planned)
  • Application Tracker (planned)
  • Interview Tracker (planned)
  • Learning Tracker (roadmaps + glossary live)
  • Decision Log

title: Glossary
summary: AEM and DXP terms used throughout this playbook.
body: Authoritative short definitions for enterprise digital experience engineering. Cross-links appear in the related-terms column.

title: Interview Prep
summary: Technical and behavioral questions for AEM and DXP roles.
body: Guidance-oriented preparation — frameworks and topics employers commonly assess. Not a guarantee of exact questions at any company.

title: Living Roadmap
body: Official Adobe documentation and courses referenced across this playbook. Milestone 12 will add publishing (GitHub Pages, print, PDF).
